given: User navigates to the record stock page
then: A form is displayed with input fields for SKU, location, quantity, and tracking code
architectural_notes: Outermost boundary is the rendered UI view; no service/DB state is asserted, so E2E. Owner module: client record-stock form view served by the app/routes boundary (app/routes/stock.py). Cross-cutting: input validation is owned at the app/routes boundary per software-design-principles and surfaced inline next to the field (design brief); the form holds no domain logic.
